cases.description: Mapped from execution-specs MCOPY with mem_size 0, copy_size 0, and dynamic source/destination onto an RPC-only deploy/call/storage-assert flow.
notes: Upstream intent: benchmark MCOPY with mem_size=0, copy_size=0, fixed_src_dst=False.
RPC mapping: runtime executes the same admitted MCOPY shape, stores dynamic offsets in slots 0x03/0x04, then stores MSIZE in slot0 and slot1.
Admitted because the dynamically evaluated MCOPY offsets are stored in the runtime prior to execution, allowing dynamic MSIZE expectation derivation.

cases.description: Mapped from execution-specs MLOAD at offset 0 with uninitialized memory and mem_size 0 onto an RPC-only deploy/call/storage-assert flow.
notes: Upstream intent: benchmark MLOAD at offset 0 with offset_initialized=False and mem_size=0.
RPC mapping: runtime reproduces the benchmark setup shape, persists the observed result in slot0, and persists MSIZE in slot1.
Admitted because both the operation result and the resulting memory size are directly observable in final storage.
